raw_products.bookDescription:
This engaging book is designed to strain your brain, not your eyes, featuring over 80 word searches in a large-print format for easy readability.Key Features:Gradual Difficulty: Enjoy word searches that become progressively more challenging, keeping you engaged and motivated as you move through the book. Large-Print Format: Each word search is spread out over two pages, making it easier to read and solve without straining your eyes. Comprehensive Solutions: Find complete answers in the final section of the book, making it easy to check your work and stay on track. Spiral Bound Convenience: The spiral binding allows the book to lie flat, offering a comfortable and convenient solving experience. Great for a Variety of Ages: Enjoyable for teenagers, adults, and seniors. Why Choose Brain Games? The Brain Games series is expertly developed to help people of all ages increase memory, sharpen reasoning, and expand creative thinking. Whether you enjoy word searches, crosswords, Sudoku, or logic puzzles, Brain Games offers a variety of puzzle books that provide a vigorous mental workout, enhancing cognitive functions such as: Attention: Focus on solving intricate puzzles and complex grids. Creative Thinking: Use clues and innovative strategies to think outside the box. General Knowledge: Expand your vocabulary and knowledge base with diverse topics. Language Skills: Improve spelling, word recognition, and language proficiency. Problem Solving: Develop strategies to complete puzzles efficiently, from crosswords to logic challenges. Visual Search: Hone your ability to spot patterns, sequences, and details in various types of puzzles.  Brain Games puzzle books are designed to provide an entertaining and effective way to maintain and enhance your mental agility. Brain Games offers a fun and stimulating experience that supports lifelong cognitive health.

Unfortunately, there were 10 puzzeles missing the clue from the word list. In Puzzle 82, the list word was Bridge - it was not in the puzzle. Also in the list was the word Dynamic but the word within the puzzle was DynaIMC. Puzzle 87  was missing the word Strike; Puzzle 103 List word was Afro - within the puzzle were the words AFFO & ARFO; Puzzle 113 was missing the word Royalty while Puzzle 114 was missing Censer. Puzzzle 134 Was missing Penitance and 139 listed Nectar but within the confines of the puzzle, I found the word Nector. Puzzle 148 gave us Heratic but the puzzle had Yerrtic. productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I love word searches, so I purchased this collection by Senior Tasse and this was what I wanted. It is large print to easily find and circle the words, but the topics/themes of the searches are my favourite part. They range from aliens to country themes, to NASCAR, to terms relating to sculpture and fashion. Also, THERE ARE SO MANY! Each two-page spread features 4 puzzles and they range in difficulty. No other word search puzzle book I have seen has a design like this one. The fun part for me is training my brain to find those not-so-obvious words and phrases amid those I have already found. Digital games are great, but old fashioned book puzzles still have a place. Get this for a road trip for your kids and help them define the words! Get this for that friend or relative that loves a good puzzle while listening to talk radio or music! Get this for you, to enjoy and relax! With 5000 words to find, it is absolutely worth the purchase!

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Just stop looking and buy these
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Ever get frustrated thinking these word find puzzles are just too hard and the print is too fine? Well boy howdy these are the ones for you. At first glance they may look like any other ordinary word find puzzles you find at your local grocery store, pharmacy or all you can eat buffet... and then you are struck like a sack of sweet potatoes to the face. The perfect font like the most beautiful sunset you have ever seen, combined with the perfect size for anyone that is over the age of 85 years young, like the kind you will read clearly from the moon even if you have cataracts. It's at that moment that you realize you have struck gold, and not the cheap 41.7 % 10K gold like the kind you find at 5 Below, we are talking 24K that you find at only the finest jewelry retailers such as Costco. The included pens included glide over the paper like a majestic gazelle on the Serengeti desert, and don't even get me started on the longevity of them, My mother has now completed 1,976 pages of word finds and you wouldn't even think she has been through more than 1,823 pages at the most. If you are in the market for over 380 pages of blissful and stress free word finds, then these are your one stop shop, instant buy and be done. If you are looking for tiny print, crappy paper and no included circling/line through devices these are not going to be your cup of tea, but everyone is entitled to their opinions even if they are wrong. Short story long... buy these, move on and spend time with the ones you hold near and dear to your heart.God speed little doodlesOcho

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Varied themes, larger print, ABC word order
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Word search in large print is easier to see, seek and find. The paper feels & looks like good quality with a mid-weight thickness. The lettering is crisp and clear to see & read. The value for 224 puzzles is affordable, in my opinion. I like the bigger book size and much prefer them over smaller books. Each puzzle is titled and numbered and the word search words are in alphabetical order. I like these features! Scrambling of letters are at a moderate level, in my opinion.I took one star off of my review for the following two reasons:1. This huge book contains double puzzle pages (2 puzzles per page). I prefer a single puzzle on one page because it messed with my eyes and is distracting,.for me personally.*I tore a plain white page from the back of the book to use for covering the puzzle I am not working on. This really helps!2. The answer key is no longer available in this book itself. In the back of the book, a note states the key has been moved to online and provides a QR code to scan (see pic). For me personally, it's much simpler to flip to the back of a physical book, to get help if needed or to just check my work, rather than having to go online!Overall, I think key this huge book of large print word search puzzles is made well, affordable, has varied themes, & multiple puzzles. Good value for the price point!

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: As an avid work search puzzle worker, I enjoyed working the puzzles in this book. They brought back wonderful memories of my youth and many smiles to my face. The format is perfect; however, I have one suggestion. Listing the words in alphabetical order is wonderful but I think the puzzles would be more enjoyable if the list of words were listed vertically instead of horizontally. I work an average of 5 to 6 books a month (yes I'm addicted to them) but this is one of very few books that the word lists are formatted this way. I find it a little harder to find the words in the list after I've found them in the puzzle. If not for this small difference, I would most definitely give the book a rating of 5.
